title: RETRO LUGGAGE TAG - novelty funky unique unusual baggage fob strap - I LOVE HOLIDAYS PVC merchandise
features: Approx 8.5 x 5.5cm in length (not including clip).
description: High quality PVC luggage tag. Just clip to your suitcase or hand luggage and you can ensure if your items go missing, they have all your contact details available. Great holiday or going away gift idea. Officially licensed merchandise. Comes with easy to attach carabiner clip - no awkard clasps and buckles. Easy to attach and swap to other bags but remains very secure and super strong. Normal luggage tags can rip off or wear out but these remains strong. Also acts as a great way to customise your luggage and make it distintive! No more running after other holiday makers who mistakenly pick up your case! Approx 8.5 x 5.5cm in length (not including clip).
